CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Community Forward Sf, Inc. For Request For Early Evaluation Conference And Stay Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matthew Haulk, Esq. 415-745-3219 Hualk & Herrera for Plaintiff.
Katie Sharpless, Esq. 415-995-6302 Hnason Bridgett for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from Defense. The Court discloses he was a partner at Hanson Bridgett. No objections from either side. The Court comments and instructs parties to reflect on them.

ARGUED. Ms. Sharpless informs court of timeline and automatic complex designation. The Court shares its views. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT COMMUNITY FORWARD SF, INC.'s Motion Of Defendant Community Forward Sf, Inc. For Request For Early Evaluation Conference And Stay Of Proceedings.

Defendant Community Forward SF, Inc.'s unopposed Motion And Motion Of Defendant Community Forward Sf, Inc. For Request For Early Evaluation Conference And Stay Of Proceedings is GRANTED.

The court orders an early evaluation conference before the Honorable Stephen M. Murphy in Department 606 of this court on December 19, 2025, at 9:30 a.m.

This action is stayed until the 120th day after this order or until the neutral declares the EEC has concluded, whichever occurs first.

Defendant is ordered to submit a proposed order to contestdept302tr@sftc.org by 8:30 am on 11/5/2025. The proposed order must satisfy the requirements of Labor Code section 2699.3(f)(3) and all other requirements for an order granting a request for an EEC under PAGA.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Community Forward Sf, Inc. For Request For Early Evaluation Conference And Stay Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-23-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT COMMUNITY FORWARD SF, INC.'s, Motion For Request For Early Evaluation Conference And Stay Of Proceedings.

Defendant Community Forward SF, Inc.'s unopposed Motion And Motion Of Defendant Community Forward Sf, Inc. For Request For Early Evaluation Conference And Stay Of Proceedings is CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 5, 2025, AT 9;00 A.M. IN THIS DEPARTMENT.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
